title: Garp Invades Hachinosu
description: On pages 11–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, SWORD, Garp, Unknown person #10, Edison, Unknown person #11 as Garp storms Hachinosu to rescue Koby, bringing SWORD, Blackbeard’s commanders, and pirate island chaos into direct conflict.
scene: Garp storms Hachinosu to rescue Koby, bringing SWORD, Blackbeard’s commanders, and pirate island chaos into direct conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And wipe that dirty look off your face!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: is she scolding the building... with a whip...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I'd be happy to break you in!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What? You don't get many Marines around here?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Navy Ho rear Admiral (sword member) KUJAKU" a tamer woman who ate the whip-whip fruit (granddaughter of great staff officer Tsuru)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, at least you're both cute. Why don't you come a lil' closer?

dialogue.speaker: Garp
dialogue.text: We've got you cornered now, KOBY!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Everyone get ready to pump him fulla lead!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huff... huff... I guess this is the end of the line...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These must be GP flowers! Who the hell did this?!

dialogue.speaker: Garp
dialogue.text: Koby- Senpai, get your butt over here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: And don't get the wrong idea!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I ain't here to help ya, I was going out for lunch and just happened to be in the area!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I used flower bullets, so they won't be able to use their guns for a while!

dialogue.speaker: Edison
dialogue.text: navy hq commander (member of sword) HIBari

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: How are things on your end?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the heck?! I don't remember the town center looking like this!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Navy 40 Vice Admiral (member of sword) PRINCE GRUS a clay man who ate the squeich-squeich fruit

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Did the buildings move or something?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he
